ground_truth.title: Cater Sandwiches, Breakfast, Platters & More | Chick-fil-A
ground_truth.main_content: Chick-fil-A Catering offers comprehensive catering solutions for events of all sizes. Whether you're feeding a crowd of coworkers or hosting a small dinner, mealtimes are made easier with Chick-fil-A Catering. Order party trays, packaged meals, entrées, sides and more so you can spend less time cooking and more time enjoying the conversation. Packaged meals include entrée options from catered sandwiches and Chick-fil-A Nuggets to tasty wraps, available in quantities of 10, 25, 50 and more. Trays come in small, medium and large sizes to serve various group sizes. Breakfast catering features Chicken Biscuits, Berry Parfaits, and Chick-n-Minis in quantities of 10, 25, 50 and more. Additional menu categories include entrées (sandwiches, salads, nuggets, wraps), sides (Waffle Potato Chips, Fruit Cups, Side Salads), desserts (Chocolate Chunk Cookies, Chocolate Fudge Brownies), and beverages (Sunjoy, Lemonade, Iced Tea, bottled drinks, boxed coffee). Most restaurants can prepare catering orders with less than 24 hours lead time. No minimum order size required for pickup. Gluten free options are available. Pickup and delivery options are available. Members of Chick-fil-A One receive points on qualifying catering purchases.
with: Chick-fil-A® Catering offers comprehensive catering solutions for events of all sizes.
Order party trays, packaged meals, entrées, sides and more so you can spend less time cooking and more time enjoying the conversation.
Most restaurants can prepare catering orders with less than 24 hours lead time.
No minimum order size required for pickup in restaurant.
Members of Chick-fil-A One receive points on qualifying catering purchases.
